Video.summary: We tear down Project Spartan to rebuild it, but its surprisingly strong engine changes our plans.
Video.title: Kaiser Jeep Chaos

Video.summary: Chris tests a new welder on Project Spartan's roll cage while Eric inspects the motor.
Video.title: The Kaiser Gets a Roll Cage

Image.alt: The Kaiser Gets a Roll Cage
The Kaiser Gets a Roll Cage
The Kaiser Gets a Roll Cage

Video.summary: Chris and Eric battle the truly insane rust in Project Spartan's '69 M715 Kaiser Jeep cab.
Video.title: Our 1960s Jeep is a Rust Bucket

Image.alt: Our 1960s Jeep is a Rust Bucket
Our 1960s Jeep is a Rust Bucket
Our 1960s Jeep is a Rust Bucket

Video.summary: Chris and Eric are tackling Project Spartan axles and turbocharging the Polaris UTV for off-road adventures.
Video.title: Axles, Tires and Turbo, Oh My!

Image.alt: Axles, Tires and Turbo, Oh My!
Axles, Tires and Turbo, Oh My!
Axles, Tires and Turbo, Oh My!

Video.summary: Prepare to be floored by this 1946 Dodge Power Wagon resto-mod from Vintage Dream Machines.
Video.title: Power Wagon

Video.summary: Tommy and Peyton get cracking on a true piece of 90s muscle, their 1990 Mustang.
Video.title: Stumbling Out the Gate

Video.summary: Tommy and Peyton get to work on their 1990 Mustang installing a new front and rear suspension.
Video.title: A Pair of New Horseshoes

Video.summary: It's time to triple the horsepower in our 1990 Mustang! Project Fast Lane Fox Body is getting a new heart.
Video.title: This Horse Has Horsepower

Video.summary: Tommy and Peyton's 1990 Mustang is about to undergo a major transformation with a new widebody kit.
Video.title: A Bit of Plastic Surgery

Video.summary: Tommy and Peyton are set to get their new five-speed transmission into their Fox Body Mustang.
Video.title: Open Heart Surgery

Video.summary: It's all about the looks as Tommy and Peyton start on the interior changes to their 1990 Fox Body Mustang.
Video.title: Saddled Up

Video.summary: It's a blast from the past when project Fast Lane finally sings.
Video.title: The Ice Horse

Video.summary: Eric and Joel unearth the Cummins-crown-jewel dually diesel, a ’93 Dodge Ram W350.
Video.title: Diesel Diamond in the Rough

Video.summary: The guys inject some power into their B-series Cummins with a VE to P pump swap on their 93 Dodge Dually.
Video.title: Pump It Up

Video.summary: We yank out our old suspension, upgrade the underside of our Diesel Dually, and give new disc brakes.
Video.title: Lift & Shift

Video.summary: Our Dodge Dually, Project Nightshift, will shed its skin today as we buzz off all the imperfections.
Video.title: Prime Time Axle Folly

Video.summary: Get your brushes ready because our Dodge Diesel Dually, Nightshift, is turning to the dark side.
Video.title: One-ton, Two-tone Transformation

Video.summary: We lay down the freshly painted back end on our 1993 Dodge W350.
Video.title: Bedtime

Video.summary: '93 Dodge Dually gets rebuilt transfer case, turbo plumbing, and brake line tips.
Video.title: Project Nightshift: Working Overtime

Video.summary: 1993 Dodge Ram Dually gets wiring fixed, seats installed, door panels refurbished, and a maiden voyage.
Video.title: Project Nightshift Putting in Work

Video.summary: "Dark Matters," Jason Mode's '68 C10, is a subtly modded, powerful truck with killer black and red style.
Video.title: Jason Mode - Dark Matters C10

Video.summary: Our 1969 Jeep M715 Project Spartan is getting a frame-up overhaul to look like a truck again.
Video.title: Lighting the Way Forward

Video.summary: Can our budget build rival a new Lexus?
Video.title: The Perfect Project Car?

Video.summary: As we resume work on our 1966 Chevy Nova, we learn that this project may go from Starstruck to Struck Out.
Video.title: Project Struck Out / 69 GTO Part 1

Video.summary: The warden's calling for diagnostics for Detroit Muscle's next prisoner, their 1969 Pontiac GTO.
Video.title: 69 GTO Part 2 - Medical Checkup

Video.summary: We’ll drive, teardown, and media blast a 1974 Bronco to uncover what lies beneath 40+ years of abuse.
Video.title: Beach Cruiser Bronco

Video.summary: With the help of some master craftsmen, the guys start building a Bronco from the ground up.
Video.title: Building A Bronco

Video.summary: Our ’74 Bronco build is getting a suspension overhaul plus new axles, brakes, wheels and tires!
Video.title: First Gen Bronco Gets a Modern Suspension

Image.alt: First Gen Bronco Gets a Modern Suspension
First Gen Bronco Gets a Modern Suspension
First Gen Bronco Gets a Modern Suspension

Video.summary: It’s time to mock everything in place in our 1974 Bronco.
Video.title: Mocking Up a New 1974 Bronco

Video.summary: We welcome legendary custom car builder Chris Ryan and his team to help with our 1974 Bronco.
Video.title: The Beach Cruiser Bronco Gets Its Colors

Image.alt: The Beach Cruiser Bronco Gets Its Colors
The Beach Cruiser Bronco Gets Its Colors
The Beach Cruiser Bronco Gets Its Colors

Video.summary: It’s final assembly for our 1974 Bronco.
Video.title: Adding Coyote Power to a Rebuilt Bronco

Image.alt: Adding Coyote Power to a Rebuilt Bronco
Adding Coyote Power to a Rebuilt Bronco
Adding Coyote Power to a Rebuilt Bronco

Video.summary: We wrap up the assembly of our Bronco.
Video.title: ’74 Bronco Chills with Aftermarket Air Conditioning

Image.alt: ’74 Bronco Chills with Aftermarket Air Conditioning
’74 Bronco Chills with Aftermarket Air Conditioning
’74 Bronco Chills with Aftermarket Air Conditioning

Video.summary: Today we finish the final assembly of our 1974 Beach Cruiser Bronco with the installation of the interior.
Video.title: 1974 Beach Cruiser Bronco Is Ready To Roll

Image.alt: 1974 Beach Cruiser Bronco Is Ready To Roll
1974 Beach Cruiser Bronco Is Ready To Roll
1974 Beach Cruiser Bronco Is Ready To Roll

Video.summary: The guys work hard to finish their 1974 build under the hood, under the frame, and under the top.
Video.title: Beach Cruiser Bronco Heads to Vegas

Image.alt: Beach Cruiser Bronco Heads to Vegas
Beach Cruiser Bronco Heads to Vegas
Beach Cruiser Bronco Heads to Vegas

Video.summary: The guys show off the completed 1974 Bronco on the floor at SEMA.
Video.title: Beach Cruiser Bronco Finale

Video.summary: We do something never done before: build two engines to run on the dyno at the SAME TIME!
Video.title: Two Engines, One Big Plan

Video.summary: We connect TWO 496 Big Block Chevy engines to the dyno to find out exactly how much power they make.
Video.title: Two 496 Big Blocks on One Dyno

Image.alt: Two 496 Big Blocks on One Dyno
Two 496 Big Blocks on One Dyno
Two 496 Big Blocks on One Dyno

Video.summary: We seek more power from our twin-engine setup by reconfiguring the exhaust and phasing the engines.
Video.title: More Double Dyno Tech

Video.summary: We fabricate a new cross member, mounting brackets, and install the transfer case on our 1969 Jeep Kaiser.
Video.title: Assembling Our Base

Video.summary: Is custom exhaust worth it on a budget build?
Video.title: Tune & Tone
